title: oligonucleotide_offtarget_gencode_cross_v1 — cross-axis off-target screen row (OLIGONUCLEOTIDE × RIBOZYME GENCODE pool)
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/oligonucleotide_offtarget_gencode_cross.py — CROSS-AXIS integration A2. One row per candidate ASO/siRNA sequence screened for hybridization off-targets against the RIBOZYME axis's vendored GENCODE v47 protein-coding-transcript subset (ribozyme/spec/human_transcript_pool_snapshot.json, loaded READ-ONLY per AGENTS.tape g11). Duplex ΔG°(37) is computed by the OLIGONUCLEOTIDE axis's SantaLucia (1998) unified nearest-neighbor model (PNAS 95:1460-1465; imported, not re-implemented — AGENTS.tape f3), scaled by the matched-base fraction; hits at or below off_target_dG_gate_kcal_mol are flagged and ranked by ΔG° (most negative first). HONESTY (AGENTS.tape g8 / f2 / g3 / f1 / f_lattice_fit): any PASS produced alongside these rows is an in-silico simulator-consistency result ONLY — never a therapeutic, clinical, regulatory, immunogenic, knockdown, or efficacy claim. SCOPE: the pool is a GENCODE v47 SUBSET (n≈200 pc-transcripts, ~400 nt each), NOT the full ~250k-transcript human transcriptome — a clean verdict is clean ON THAT SUBSET only, not a genome-wide wet-lab off-target clearance. The OLIGONUCLEOTIDE axis is expansion-main (NOT core-5); the modality is described via its own drug precedent (nusinersen/Spinraza, patisiran/Onpattro, inclisiran), never derived from the n=6 lattice.

candidate_5to3.description: candidate ASO / siRNA guide screened, 5'->3' (U normalized to T)

pool_source.description: provenance string for the RIBOZYME axis's vendored GENCODE transcript pool

pool_size_n.description: number of GENCODE transcripts in the vendored subset screened

pool_kb.description: total scanned pool size in kilobases of transcript sequence

off_target_dG_gate_kcal_mol.description: duplex ΔG°(37) gate; a window at or below this value is flagged as a candidate off-target (more negative = more stable = worse)

max_flagged_per_kb_gate.description: flood gate; a candidate FAILs when flagged_per_kb exceeds this value

windows_scanned.description: total number of length-matched sliding windows examined across the pool

min_duplex_dG37_kcal_mol.description: most stable (most negative) effective duplex ΔG°(37) found across the pool

n_flagged_off_targets.description: count of windows at or below the off-target ΔG gate

n_transcripts_with_hits.description: number of distinct GENCODE transcripts contributing at least one flagged hit

flagged_per_kb.description: n_flagged_off_targets normalized to flagged hits per kb of scanned pool

flood_verdict.description: off-target flood verdict (mirrors ribozyme_off_target_screen.py verdict style)

overall_pass.description: true iff flagged_per_kb does not exceed max_flagged_per_kb_gate

flagged_top.description: highest-stability flagged off-target hits, ranked by ΔG° ascending (most negative first)

transcript_id.description: GENCODE v47 transcript identifier (ENST..., version stripped)

gene.description: GENCODE gene name for the transcript

offset.description: 0-based start offset of the flagged window within the transcript

window_5to3.description: transcript window flagged as a candidate off-target, 5'->3'

matches.description: count of complementary base matches between the window and the candidate

duplex_dG37_kcal_mol.description: effective SantaLucia NN duplex ΔG°(37) of the window, scaled by match fraction
